name: com.beamable.notifications
description: Cross-platform Beamable notifications SDK for Unity (iOS + Android): local + remote push, deep links, templates, action buttons, rich media, closed-app analytics.
_com.beamable_version_TODO: TEMPORARY PIN (Decision Q9): com.beamable is hard-pinned to 5.1.0 for now. This must later auto-adjust to track the consumer's already-installed Beamable version rather than forcing this exact version — see spec §5.3 / §7 remaining item Q9-auto-adjust.

samples.description: IMGUI test harness exercising local/remote notifications + deep links, plus a sample native receive-time handler you customize from the Beamable Notifications editor window.
